## Problem

What workflow or limitation are you trying to improve?

## Proposal

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Why Owledge

Explain why this belongs in a Markdown-first memory and planning utility rather than in a hosted platform or unrelated runtime.

## Evidence

Link relevant docs, examples, or comparable repos if useful.
